description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The front facade features a large central door with a small overhang, flanked by horizontal strip windows on one side and a large picture window on the other. A small fenced yard with green patches and a patio area containing outdoor furniture is present at the front, adding to the residential feel. The sides and rear of the house are mostly plain, with one side showing a single large window and the other side and back being largely unadorned. The exterior is finished in light, neutral colors, and the structure is surrounded by a simple wooden fence. The overall appearance is clean, geometric, and functional, typical of contemporary urban housing.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, minimalist facade, and a small fenced front yard with patio furniture. The design features large windows and a clean, geometric exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, horizontal strip windows, a large picture window, and a fenced yard with patio furniture.
description_view_1: Side view with a plain wall and a glimpse of the fenced yard and green patch at the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a featureless back wall and the flat roof, with minimal architectural details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a single large window and the fenced yard with patio furniture visible at the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture and strip windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with a small overhang, flanked by windows, and a fenced patio area with outdoor furniture
